positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a cosmic forest vista. Central to the composition is a majestic, stylized crescent moon nestled among giant, bioluminescent flora. The trees should have sweeping, elegant silhouettes and deep, saturated colors (indigo, cyan, amethyst, deep teal). Floating geometric nebula patterns drift through the branches, creating a sense of deep space within the forest. Style: Neo-art nouveau meets cosmic psychedelic art, rendered with crisp, clean lines and bold, flat areas of color for maximum print impact. Focus on strong contrast between the glowing flora and the deep background space. The overall mood is mystical and serene. Central composition, perfect for apparel repeat or single motif.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, noisy, grain, low detail, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, trademarks, writing, photo, realistic, photographic, signature
